seed_instruction: Draft an email to a hotel requesting room availability for next weekend.
org_constraint: The email must contain exactly five sentences.
new_constraint: The email must contain three paragraphs, each consisting of at least five sentences.
instruction: Draft an email to a hotel requesting room availability for next weekend. The email must contain exactly five sentences. The email must contain three paragraphs, each consisting of at least five sentences.
response:
Subject: Room Availability Request for Next Weekend

Dear Hotel Management Team, I am writing to formally request information regarding room availability for next weekend. Our travel plans have been finalized, and we are hoping to secure accommodations for a group of four guests. We are particularly interested in a suite that offers a comfortable space for our family reunion. Please let us know if any rooms matching these criteria are currently open for booking. We would appreciate a prompt response to assist us in finalizing our reservations.

We are flexible regarding specific dates, but our primary preference is Friday the twenty-fourth through Sunday the twenty-sixth. If the requested dates are fully booked, kindly inform us of the nearest available alternative dates that might work for our itinerary. We understand that high demand during weekends can sometimes limit options, so we are open to discussing any available upgrades. Your team's expertise in managing local rates would be greatly appreciated in this regard. We look forward to finding a solution that meets our needs and budget constraints.

Thank you very much for your time and assistance with this important inquiry. We hope to stay with your establishment for a memorable and relaxing experience during our upcoming visit. Please feel free to contact me directly via phone or email if you require any additional details from our side. We are eager to hear from you soon to confirm our stay. Thank you again for your help in making our weekend plans a reality.
